entries.name: FPSLoadoutRoot
entries.aggregateText: TACTICAL ARMORY OPS / LOADOUT / PRIMARY CONFIGURATION OPERATOR POWER 864 WEIGHT BUDGET 26 / 30 PRESET SLOT ALPHA-03 Back Queue Match Weapon Catalog Select a stable rifle profile, then tune optics, barrel, grip, and magazine behavior. PRIMARY / ASSAULT RIFLES / CONTROL BUILD AER-45 Carbine Balanced recoil, clean first-shot reset DAMAGE 43 / RPM 710 SELECTED KSR-12 Burst Fast pick utility with strict cadence HEADSHOT MULTIPLIER 1.6 Raptor CQB Short barrel brawler for hard entries MOBILITY PRIORITY Hydra DMR High precision at long lane control RANGE PRIORITY VLM Scout Light marksman setup for flank duty ADS SPEED PRIORITY Selected Platform Stable recoil pattern with low visual noise and clear stat anchors. AER-45 Carbine CONTROLLED MID-RANGE PACKAGE 16 in barrel Low-rise optic Match recoil grip ACCURACY 84 RECOIL 31 HANDLING 67 CONTROL INDEX 91 FIELD NOTE Keep muzzle climb predictable. This build is meant to translate cleanly into a low-risk procedural Unity preview. Attachment Board Each slot is expressed as a direct panel block with explicit bounds. OPTIC Falcon 2x clean sight picture, low sway MUZZLE Vector Brake vertical kick reduction BARREL 16 in Match tuned for recoil lane stability UNDERBARREL Atlas Grip horizontal stabilization MAGAZINE 40 Round extended combat pacing REAR GRIP Carbon Wrap steadier ADS transition LOADOUT SUMMARY This configuration trades a small amount of mobility for calmer recoil and easier burst correction. Save Preset Apply Build Stat Compare DAMAGE 43 +2 vs base RANGE 71 +8 reach ADS SPEED 228 ms -12 ms SPRINT OUT 112 ms +stable BUILD READINESS Ranked Ready Stable spread and low visual noise for repeat preview checks.
